description: Goal: make the Compiler2 front-door implementation read as the work-graph spine instead of a pile of indexing helpers. Signal: tests observe generic job spans and world/model invariant panics, not private accessors or impossible diagnostics. Strategy: rename index to work, centralize job spans in drive, make Code/World total where ids imply state, move FnDef arity to the AST, inline one-off helpers, and keep Compiler2 tests telemetry-facing.
title: Compiler2 refactor: clarify work spine and model invariants
